name: deepgram
description: Transcribe prerecorded audio from URLs and manage projects, balances, and models via the Deepgram API

envVars.name: DEEPGRAM_API_KEY
envVars.description: Deepgram API key from the Deepgram console

tools.name: Transcribe URL
tools.description: Transcribe a prerecorded audio file from a publicly accessible URL

language.description: BCP-47 language tag of the audio, e.g. en or es

smart_format.description: Apply smart formatting to numbers, dates, and currency

url.description: Publicly accessible URL of the audio file to transcribe

tools.name: List Projects
tools.description: List the Deepgram projects associated with the API key

historicalSummary.omitted: company metadata and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Project Balances
tools.description: Get the outstanding credit balances for a project

project_id.description: ID of the project (from List Projects)

tools.name: List Models
tools.description: List the speech-to-text and text-to-speech models Deepgram offers

prompts.title: Transcribe an audio URL
prompts.prompt: Transcribe this audio file with Deepgram and give me a clean transcript: <paste URL>

prompts.title: Check credit balance
prompts.prompt: List my Deepgram projects and check the remaining credit balance on each.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Deepgram API Setup

steps.title: Create a Deepgram account
steps.description: Go to https://console.deepgram.com and sign up. New accounts receive free credits to test transcription without a credit card.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: In the console, open your project, go to Settings → API Keys, and create a new key. Choose the Member role (or narrower) for day-to-day transcription.

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Copy the key and add it to your .env file as DEEPGRAM_API_KEY=...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Projects tool to confirm the key works, then transcribe a sample file such as https://dpgr.am/spacewalk.wav

notes: Authentication uses the Authorization header with the Token prefix (Authorization: Token <key>), not Bearer
Transcription is billed per minute of audio and draws down project credits
The Transcribe URL tool only handles remote files — uploading raw audio bytes is not supported by this connector
